error[E0502]: cannot borrow `*base` as immutable because it is also borrowed as mutable
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/grok-code-fast-1/declarations/restrict_def_2b/sample_001/target.rs:56:56
   |
56 |         f(n, &mut base[ps_usize..ps_usize + n_usize], &base[qs_usize..qs_usize + n_usize]);
   |         -         ---- mutable borrow occurs here      ^^^^ immutable borrow occurs here
   |         |
   |         mutable borrow later used by call
   |
   = help: use `.split_at_mut(position)` to obtain two mutable non-overlapping sub-slices
